briefdescription.para: Gets index that current object has in its parent's children collection.

simplesect.para: The index of the current object
The string with human readable role converted from enumeration

briefdescription.para: Gets localized name of accessibility role.

simplesect.para: The string with human readable role translated according to current translation domain
translation is not supported in this version
States class is instatation of ArrayBitset template class
The map of attributes and their values
Hidden means not present in the AT-SPI tree.

briefdescription.para: Gets unique address on accessibility bus.
Deputes an object to perform provided gesture.
Gets information about current object and all relations that connects it with other accessibility objects.

simplesect.para: The iterable collection of Relation objects

briefdescription.para: Gets the Actor associated with this Accessible (if there is one).
Sets whether to listen for post render callback.

parameterdescription.para: If ture, registration post render callback, false otherwise

simplesect.para: The string property value. Empty string if property does not exist.

detaileddescription.para: Override DoGetInterfaces() to customize the return value of this method.
Converts all interfaces returned by GetInterfaces() to their DBus names using GetInterfaceName().

simplesect.para: The collection of names of implemented interfaces

briefdescription.para: Checks if object is on root level.

simplesect.para: Whether object is on root level or not

briefdescription.para: Dumps tree structure of accessible objects starting from self.

parameterdescription.para: Detail level of dumped json output.

briefdescription.para: Gets Accessible object containing given point.

parameterdescription.para: The enumeration with type of coordinate system

simplesect.para: The handle to last child of current object which contains given point

briefdescription.para: Checks if the current object contains the given point inside.

parameterdescription.para: The enumeration with type of coordinate system

simplesect.para: True if accessible contains in point, otherwise false.
This method is Contains in DBus method.

detaileddescription.para: This template function registers an existing feature instance. The feature type T must inherit from IAccessibilityFeature.

parameterdescription.para: Shared pointer to the existing feature instance

briefdescription.para: Gets a feature of type T.

detaileddescription.para: This template function retrieves a previously registered feature instance. The feature type T must inherit from IAccessibilityFeature.

simplesect.para: Shared pointer to the feature instance, or nullptr if not found
Returns nullptr if the feature has not been registered or if the dynamic cast to type T fails.

detaileddescription.para: This pure virtual function must be implemented by derived classes to initialize the default set of accessibility features for the specific accessible object type.

simplesect.para: This function is called during the initialization of the accessible object to set up the basic accessibility features that are always available.

briefdescription.para: Returns the collection of AT-SPI interfaces implemented by this Accessible.

detaileddescription.para: This method is called only once and its return value is cached. Must override this and fill interface if you determine which interfaces are implemented.

This method is to get the highlight itself.
The highlight actor

This method is to set the highlight itself.
actor
The highlight actor

briefdescription.para: The method registers functor resposible for converting Actor into Accessible.

parameterdescription.para: The returning Accessible handle from Actor object

briefdescription.para: Acquires Accessible object from Actor object.

simplesect.para: The raw pointer to Accessible object

briefdescription.para: Acquires Accessible object from Actor object.

simplesect.para: The owning pointer to Accessible object

briefdescription.para: Obtains the DBus interface name for the specified AT-SPI interface.
Basic interface implemented by all accessibility objects.
